mapper.url: https://aitable.ai/fusion/v1/datasheets/{{18.data.data.records[].fields.`ds-4`}}/records?filterByFormula=AND({Category}="{{5.fields.`Category Name`[]}}",NOT({Status}="Scrape Failed"),{Times Used}<{{18.data.data.records[].fields.`RSS Item Use Limit`}},IS_AFTER({Created Date},DATEADD(TODAY(),-{{18.data.data.records[].fields.`RSS Item Use Time`}},"days")),NOT(find("{{5.fields.`Site Name`}}",{BAM Sites})))&pageSize=20&sort={"field": "Created Date", "order": "desc"}

messages.content:
Your task is to select one (1) Record ID based on what News Story Title would be the best fit for the Site "{{5.fields.`Site Name`}}"

You are given a list of news story titles (and sometimes also a description for that news story). Your task is then to pick the best news story for the Site, and output the Record ID.

You only output the record ID and nothing else.

Info about {{5.fields.`Site Name`}}=
{{5.fields.`Site Info`}}

messages.content:
Your job is to analyze a text string and determine if it contains a written article.
Not just a link to article but the written text of the article as well.
You then output either "yes" or "no".
yes = The string does contains the article text.
no = The string does not contains the article text.
You only output either yes or no
Nothing else.

Text String to Analyze=
{{32.text}}

select.label: Create a Chat Completion (GPT and o1 models)

messages.content:
Your task is to create a query topic phrase for finding an image in a large image database that can be the hero image for the news storry "{{21.data.data.records[].fields.Title}}".
The query phrase can only be 1 or 2 words long.
Example 1: salmon
Example 2: us senate

You only output the query topic phrase and nothing else.

When dealing with celebrities never use their name. Use something that describes the situation of the title, or something hyper related to the celebrities situation. Aka. the topic.

In sports, be very aware of the term "football" always search for either American Football or Soccer. 

Examples:
Title: As Russia retakes Kursk, Ukrainians ask, 'Was it worth it?'
Query Topic Phrase: ukraine

Title: Oscar Piastri claims his first ever-pole position in China Grand Prix qualifying with McLaren team-mate Lando Norris third behind Mercedes' George Russell
Query Topic Phrase: f1 car

Please output a query topic phrase for finding an image that will pair well with the news storry "{{21.data.data.records[].fields.Title}}"
The query phrase must only be 1 or 2 words long.
Output the query topic phrase and nothing else.

messages.content:
Your task is to select the best photo for the news story titled: "{{21.data.data.records[].fields.Title}}"
And then output the URL for that photo.
You output the photo URL and nothing else.

You are given the photo URL plus a cluster of tags that describe the photo.

Try to the best of your abbility to select the best photo for the news story.
Never select AI generated images.

Please select the best photo for the news story titled: "{{21.data.data.records[].fields.Title}}"
Output the photo URL and nothing else.
Be meticulous when writing the URL, do not make any mistakes. 

Photo List=
{{39.text}}
